one_move.title: Synthetic Relationship Engine
one_move.root_constraint: Run one 90-day relationship operating rhythm: segment the synthetic database, assign every active relationship a next action, and inspect the scorecard each Friday.
one_move.recommendation: Run one 90-day relationship operating rhythm: segment the synthetic database, assign every active relationship a next action, and inspect the scorecard each Friday.
one_move.why_this_move: This intervention converts an existing fictional strength into a durable system while keeping complexity low and making progress observable.
one_move.why_now: The lab business is at a clean transition point where a simple operating rhythm can be installed before additional demand increases coordination load.
one_move.behavior_fit: The design fits a reflective, relationship-oriented operator because it uses short visible routines, a peer review, and limited administrative overhead.

one_move.why_this_move: This intervention converts an existing fictional strength into a durable system while keeping complexity low and making progress observable.

one_move.why_now: The lab business is at a clean transition point where a simple operating rhythm can be installed before additional demand increases coordination load.
